home.emptyState:
How can I help you?
Write what you need.

cleaning.title: Cleaning
cleaning.description: Cleaning for rooms, apartments, villas, etc.

translator-services.title: Translator Services
translator-services.description: Support at meetings, video calls, etc.

accompaniment.title: Event Support
accompaniment.description: Support at exhibitions, medical centers, etc.

language.title: Interface language
language.description: Choose the language for the app interface

available_tasks.question: What tasks can I delegate to the concierge service?
available_tasks.answer: We help with household, transport, travel, document, medical, legal, and other organizational matters.

create_request.question: How do I create a request?
create_request.answer: Describe the task in the chat: what you need, where, when, and any important conditions. We will ask follow-up questions if needed.

non_standard_request.question: Can I make a non-standard request?
non_standard_request.answer: Yes. Send your request in any form, even if the service is not in the catalogue. We will check what is possible and suggest a solution.

service_provider.question: Who provides the services?
service_provider.answer: Depending on the task, it is handled by our team or a vetted contractor. We organize and monitor the work.

price_calculation.question: How is the price calculated?
price_calculation.answer: The cost depends on the complexity, timing, location, and price of the selected provider. We will confirm the final cost before work begins.

payment_before_start.question: Do I need to pay before work starts?
payment_before_start.answer: Payment is made after the terms and cost are agreed. Paid work begins after payment is confirmed, unless otherwise specified.

included_cost.question: Is the contractor's cost included in the service price?
included_cost.answer: Before payment, we specify exactly what is included. Additional expenses are agreed separately.

payment_methods.question: What payment methods are available?
payment_methods.answer: Available payment methods are shown in the app when an invoice is issued. You can view your transaction history in Payments.

request_processing_time.question: How quickly are requests processed?
request_processing_time.answer: Timing depends on the task. Simple requests are handled faster, while complex services may require additional time.

urgent_request.question: Can I make an urgent request?
urgent_request.answer: Yes. State that the task is urgent and give the exact deadline. We will check availability and let you know what is possible.

request_status.question: How can I check my request status?
request_status.answer: All messages, updates, offers, and progress information are saved in the relevant request chat.

change_cancel_order.question: Can I change or cancel an order?
change_cancel_order.answer: Yes, until the provider starts work and expenses are incurred. Terms after work starts depend on the service and provider rules.

executor_unavailable.question: What happens if the provider cannot complete the task?
executor_unavailable.answer: We will try to offer a replacement or another solution. If completion is impossible, we will let you know and agree on next steps.

telegram_email.question: Can I connect Telegram or email?
telegram_email.answer: Yes. Connections are available in account settings and provide additional ways to receive request updates.

languages.question: Which languages does the service support?
languages.answer: The app interface is available in English and Russian. Support in other languages depends on the task and translator availability.

document_security.question: Is it safe to send documents through the service?
document_security.answer: Send only documents and data needed for the task. We use them solely to organize the requested service. Documents are deleted from our servers after the service is completed or at your request.

legal_medical_services.question: Does the concierge service provide legal and medical services itself?
legal_medical_services.answer: We can find a specialist and organize a consultation or appointment. Professional legal and medical services are provided by qualified specialists and organizations.

service_locations.question: In which cities and countries is the service available?
service_locations.answer: Availability depends on the location and service type. Specify the city or country in your request, and we will check the options.
